mizerAgents: AI Agent Support for Mizer

Source: R/mizerAgents-package.R
mizerAgents-package.Rd

mizerAgents makes it easy to set up AI coding agents to work with the mizer package for dynamic multi-species size-spectrum modelling. It bundles a mizer reference card and API documentation optimised for large language models, and deploys them into any mizer project with a single call to setup_mizer_agent().

See also

Useful links:

  • https://sizespectrum.github.io/mizerAgents/

  • https://github.com/sizespectrum/mizerAgents

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/sizespectrum/mizerAgents/issues
